157â†’        apiVer: String,

169â†’
170â†’            /*

180â†’                    activity.runOnUiThread {
181â†’                        activity.showSnackbar(context.getString(R.string.update_js_api_version, apiDevContact))

175â†’            return when {

47â†’fun JSONArray.deepClone(): JSONArray {
48â†’    val clone = JSONArray()
49â†’    for (i in 0 until length()) {
50â†’        clone.put(
51â†’            when (get(i)) {
52â†’                is JSONObject -> getJSONObject(i).deepClone()
53â†’                is JSONArray -> getJSONArray(i).deepClone()
54â†’                else -> get(i)
55â†’            },
56â†’        )
57â†’    }
58â†’    return clone
59â†’}

61â†’fun JSONArray.jsonObjectIterable(): Iterable<JSONObject> = Iterable { jsonObjectIterator() }
62â†’
63â†’@KotlinCleanup("see if jsonObject/string/longIterator() methods can be combined into one")
64â†’fun JSONArray.jsonObjectIterator(): Iterator<JSONObject> =
65â†’    object : Iterator<JSONObject> {
66â†’        private var index = 0
67â†’
68â†’        override fun hasNext(): Boolean = index < length()
69â†’
70â†’        override fun next() =
71â†’            getJSONObject(index).also {
72â†’                index++
73â†’            }
74â†’    }

76â†’fun JSONArray.stringIterable(): Iterable<String> = Iterable { stringIterator() }
77â†’
78â†’fun JSONArray.stringIterator(): Iterator<String> {
79â†’    return object : Iterator<String> {
80â†’        private var index = 0
81â†’
82â†’        override fun hasNext(): Boolean = index < length()
83â†’
84â†’        override fun next(): String {
85â†’            val string = getString(index)
86â†’            index++
87â†’            return string
88â†’        }
89â†’    }
90â†’}

116â†’
117â†’        val model = customNoteType ?: notetype
118â†’        val template =
119â†’            if (customTemplate != null) {
120â†’                customTemplate.deepClone()
121â†’            } else {
122â†’                val index = if (model.isStd) ord else 0
123â†’                model.tmpls[index]
124â†’            }
125â†’        // may differ in cloze case
126â†’        template.setOrd(card.ord)
127â†’
128â†’        val output =
129â†’            TemplateManager.TemplateRenderContext
130â†’                .fromCardLayout(

132â†’                    card = card,
133â†’                    notetype = model,
134â†’                    template = template,
135â†’                    fillEmpty = fillEmpty,

137â†’        card.renderOutput = output
138â†’        card.note = this

233â†’        val rem: MutableList<String> =
234â†’            ArrayList(
235â†’                tags.size,
236â†’            )
237â†’        for (t in tags) {
238â†’            if (t.equals(tag, ignoreCase = true)) {

282â†’    object ClozeUtils {
283â†’        private val clozeRegexPattern = Pattern.compile("\\{\\{c(\\d+)::")
284â†’
285â†’        /**
286â†’         * Calculate the next number that should be used if inserting a new cloze deletion.
287â†’         * Per the manual the next number should be greater than any existing cloze deletion
288â†’         * even if there are gaps in the sequence, and regardless of existing cloze ordering
289â†’         *
290â†’         * @param fieldValues Iterable of field values that may contain existing cloze deletions
291â†’         * @return the next index that a cloze should be inserted at
292â†’         */
293â†’        @KotlinCleanup("general regex fixes for '.group' being nullable")
294â†’        fun getNextClozeIndex(fieldValues: Iterable<String>): Int {
295â†’            var highestClozeId = 0
296â†’            // Begin looping through the fields
297â†’            for (fieldLiteral in fieldValues) {
298â†’                // Begin searching in the current field for cloze references
299â†’                val matcher = clozeRegexPattern.matcher(fieldLiteral)
300â†’                while (matcher.find()) {
301â†’                    val detectedClozeId = matcher.group(1)!!.toInt()
302â†’                    if (detectedClozeId > highestClozeId) {
303â†’                        highestClozeId = detectedClozeId
304â†’                    }
305â†’                }
306â†’            }
307â†’            return highestClozeId + 1
308â†’        }
309â†’    }
310â†’}

431â†’            JSONObject()
432â†’                .apply {
433â†’                    put(SUCCESS_KEY, true)
434â†’                    block(this)
435â†’                }.toString()
